query: SELECT gl.gestor_id, g.user_name, gl.loja_id, l.nome, l.numero_loja FROM gestor_lojas gl JOIN gestores g ON g.id = gl.gestor_id JOIN lojas l ON l.id = gl.loja_id ORDER BY g.user_name, l.nome LIMIT 30
